findings.cause: the done gate keyed on a phase string the harness never sets, so it approved prematurely
findings.fix: gate on the review-gate step status, not a phase string

findings.cause: the mandatory 100% guidelines gate trusted a cached manifest and a bare-id exception array, so it was bypassable
findings.fix: always re-extract observed facts; require {id,reason,approvedAt} exception records

findings.cause: scope-fence keyed on a scope field that was never populated, so it recorded but never fenced
findings.fix: path-segment + separator-normalized matcher on the step scope

findings.cause: a string confidence collapsed to 0.5 and flipped decisions
findings.fix: normalize confidence/behaviorChanged from strings before aggregating

findings.cause: installing from a working clone copied a token-bearing .env into the target
findings.fix: exclude .env* and .git from the installer copy

findings.cause: Delphi/Pascal was two mis-mapped duplicate entries
